(91834, 29011, '2022-07-29 17:25:09', '2022-07-29 21:25:09', 'Arthur L. Costa is professor emeritus of education at California State University, Sacramento. (91836, 29011, '2022-07-28 17:25:56', '2022-07-28 21:25:56', 'Allison Zmuda works with educators to grow ideas on how to make learning for students challenging, possible, and worthy of the attempt.
